task.name: Recalibrate OKLCH Colors and Shadcn Mappings in globals.css
task.action: Modify `src/app/globals.css`. 1) Reduce the Chroma of the `--color-error-*` scale to ~0.15 to prevent visual vibration on dark backgrounds. 2) In the `.dark` section, remap standard Shadcn variables to the Secondary (Slate) palette: `--background` to the OKLCH value of `--color-secondary-950`, `--card` to `--color-secondary-900`, `--muted` to `--color-secondary-800`. 3) CRITICAL: Remap `--accent` to the OKLCH value of `--color-secondary-800` instead of Gold to fix hover/dropdown backgrounds. `--accent-foreground` should become light text. Create a new `--color-warning-*` scale holding the current Gold/Accent values so Gold is still available as a semantic color.
task.verify: Check `globals.css` contains the updated desaturated reds and correct Shadcn variable mappings. Open dropdown menus in the app to ensure they are slate, not gold.

task.name: Define Research-Backed Interactive Card Utility
task.verify: Check `globals.css` for the utility class. Ensure it uses `background-color` and `border-color` transitions only (plus transform behind prefers-reduced-motion).

task.name: Scrub Raw Utility Colors and Apply Interactive States (Shared Components)
task.action: Search ONLY through `src/components/shared/` and `src/components/ui/` for: 1) Raw color overrides like `bg-secondary-500` (used in Skeletons to avoid gold). Since `--muted` now maps to Slate, replace these with `bg-muted`. 2) Hardcoded Tailwind colors like `text-red-500`, `bg-red-500/20`, `text-green-500`, `bg-green-500/20`. Replace with `text-error-500`, `bg-error-500/20`, `text-success-500`, `bg-success-500/20`. 3) Card containers that should be interactive: FIRST remove any existing `hover:bg-*`, `hover:border-*`, `hover:-translate-*`, `hover:shadow-*` Tailwind classes from the container div. THEN add the `interactive-card` class. Do NOT touch hover effects on buttons, links, or other non-card elements.
task.verify: Hover over cards in the UI to confirm they use the new surface-lightening pattern. Verify Skeleton components no longer have manual `bg-secondary-500` overrides.
